title: Reverse a string
intent: Produce a small utility that reverses an input string, demonstrating the spec->prompt round-trip end to end.
spec_body: Implement a function `reverse(s)` that returns the input string `s` with its characters in reverse order. Empty input returns empty output. Preserve Unicode code points (do not split surrogate pairs).
acceptance_criteria: reverse is a pure function with no side effects
dod: A run is successful when reverse() returns the exact character-reversed string for all provided examples, handles empty input, and introduces no side effects. The implementation must pass the listed acceptance criteria.
